compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The biome is experiencing a catastrophic collapse of the primary specimens. The registry-defined plants are no longer visible or have withered to non-viable states.

inventory_reconciliation.p1_string_of_nickels: Systemic Loss: Pot is empty/soil only.
inventory_reconciliation.p2_mexican_mint: Systemic Loss: Pot is empty/soil only.
inventory_reconciliation.p3_pothos: Systemic Loss: The primary Pothos foliage has detached or withered; only a remnant leaf fragment remains.
inventory_reconciliation.p4_silver_guest: Systemic Loss: No evidence of specimen.

plant_audit.p1: Empty yellow pot. No signs of life.
plant_audit.p2: Empty black pot. No signs of life.
plant_audit.p3: Contains the white rabbit anchor and a single, detached, chlorotic leaf fragment. The main stem is absent.
plant_audit.p4: Integrated into the black pot cluster; no viable plant matter detected.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears desiccated with significant surface debris (crushed eggshells).
biome_observations.anomalies: Presence of crushed eggshells across the soil surface of P3, likely an amateur attempt at calcium supplementation or pest deterrence, now serving as a marker of a failed environment.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no biological spread beyond the pots.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state showed a single green leaf in P3 and a rabbit anchor.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t1: Progressive postural collapse of the P3 leaf; loss of turgor pressure.
temporal_deltas.current: Total senescence. The P3 leaf has fully detached or withered into the soil substrate.

visual_health_inference.reasoning: The lack of chlorophyll-rich tissue, the detachment of the final leaf in P3, and the absence of any structural stems confirm the death of the specimens.

anomalies: Crushed eggshell debris in P3 soil.
Complete absence of expected plant biomass.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome has undergone a total systemic failure. Over the observed five-day period, the specimens transitioned from a state of minimal viability to complete senescence. The Pothos (P3) was the last to succumb, with its final leaf losing structural integrity and detaching. The environment is now effectively a collection of empty pots containing only soil and inorganic debris (eggshells).
